mapper.select: SELECT id, coupon_id, user_id, coupon_code, coupon_type, amount, min_amount, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time FROM coupon WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId}
SELECT id, coupon_id, user_id, coupon_code, coupon_type, amount, min_amount, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time FROM coupon WHERE coupon_code = #{couponCode}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM coupon WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNUSED' AND end_time > NOW() AND start_time <= NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (coupon_id, user_id, coupon_code, coupon_type, amount, min_amount, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{couponId}, #{userId}, #{couponCode}, #{couponType}, #{amount}, #{minAmount}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
